name: Lemon Sponge Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the grated lemon rind and juice to the egg yolks. Stir in the flour and sugar slowly.
2. Gradually beat in the milk, mixing well.
3. Beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
4. Gently fold the beaten whites into the batter.
5. Pour the mixture into a greased casserole dish placed in a pan of simmering water.
6. Bake at 325°F (165°C) for 45 minutes, or until set.
